entries.title: Tracktile
entries.subtitle: Software Engineer · ERP
entries.description: Building the systems food & beverage manufacturers run their factories on — traceability, inventory, and production workflows. The plumbing that has to never go down. I ship full-stack features with AI in the loop, cutting the path from spec to production without cutting corners.
